title: Scope
full_text:
5.4.1.1 Scope
Scope
1) Subject to the limitations stated in Article 5.4.1.2., where the heating, ventilating
and air-conditioning system does not comply with the requirements of Section 5.2., it
shall comply with Part 8.

sentences.text: Subject to the limitations stated in Article 5.4.1.2., where the heating, ventilating and air-conditioning system does not comply with the requirements of Section 5.2., it shall comply with Part 8.
